meaning: n.女人的会客室或化妆室,闺房
examples: But who will be the master of my boudoir then?
In my boudoir I sigh over the close of spring.
Next year peach and plum trees will be in bloom again, But who will be the master of my boudoir then?
And in the digital age, not only is it very easy to broadcast your boudoir adventures, the bar is low for what constitutes an adventure worth writing about.
From 8 to 10 they'll run movies on Boudoir Cinema.
